task_completion.description: Verify that the customer for the order is set to John Doe.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for 'John Doe' or 'john.doe@example.com' selected in the Customer dropdown or billing details section of the WooCommerce order page.

task_completion.description: Verify that one unit of 'Yoga Mat Premium' is added to the order.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for 'Yoga Mat Premium' in the order items list with a quantity (Qty) of 1.

task_completion.description: Verify that two units of 'Insulated Water Bottle 32oz' are added to the order.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for 'Insulated Water Bottle 32oz' in the order items list with a quantity (Qty) of 2.

task_completion.description: Verify that the 'WELCOME10' coupon is applied to the order.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the coupon code 'WELCOME10' listed in the order items table or the order totals section, showing a discount applied to the items.

task_completion.description: Verify that the manual order has been successfully created and saved.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a success message like 'Order updated' or 'Order created', or an order number at the top of the page (e.g., 'Order #123 details') indicating the order has been saved.

integrity.description: Verify the agent used the WooCommerce web interface to create the order.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show a web browser navigating the WordPress/WooCommerce admin dashboard, not a terminal or API client.

integrity.description: Verify the agent interacted with the actual WooCommerce order creation UI.
integrity.visual_evidence: Look for standard WooCommerce UI elements like the 'Add item(s)' button, 'Apply coupon' button, and the standard order totals calculation table.

integrity.description: Verify the agent did not use terminal commands (like wp-cli) to bypass the GUI.
integrity.visual_evidence: No terminal windows executing commands like 'wp wc order create' should be visible in the screenshots.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Customer: John Doe (john.doe@example.com). Product 1: 'Yoga Mat Premium' (SKU: YMP-001, Unit Price: $39.99, Qty: 1). Product 2: 'Insulated Water Bottle 32oz' (SKU: IWB-032, Unit Price: $27.99, Qty: 2). Coupon: 'WELCOME10' (10% discount). Expected Subtotal before discount: $95.97.
